title: Xtra Tangy Jamaican Pasta Bake
description: A tangy and fluffy post-workout Jamaican dish featuring dark chocolate chips, pasta-water-emulsion, and ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly ingredients, perfect for a filling dinner after a workout.

ingredients.name: pasta
ingredients.notes: whole wheat or brown rice pasta

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the pasta according to package instructions, reserving 1 cup of pasta water before draining.
In a blender or food processor, combine the reserved pasta water, coconut milk, scotch bonnet peppers, onion, garlic, and ginger, and blend until smooth.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked pasta, blended sauce, and dark chocolate chips, and stir until the chocolate is melted and the sauce is well combined.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish and sprinkle with turmeric.
Bake for 20 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
